social_headline: State of Emergency: Malique Vanderpool ordered into preventive detention
social_post: Minister of Homeland Security Roger Alexander has ordered the preventive detention of Malique Vanderpool, of Building 9, Ground Floor, Beverly Hills, Marcano Quarry, Laventille, under the Emergency Powers Regulations 2026.
